channel.title: International District Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for International District Events

item.title: Coffee & Conversations
item.description:
Monday, April 20, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: International District/Chinatown Branch, Meeting Room

Join us for a snack, some coffee or tea, and to chat with your neighbors!

From SPL - International District/Chinatown Branch

Event details

item.title: NOBUKO MIYAMOTO: FILM SCREENING, MINI-CONCERT & RECEPTION
item.description:
Thursday, April 30, 2026 at 5:30 PM

Location: Kelly Ethnic Cultural Theater, University of Washington, 3940 Brooklyn Avenue Northeast, Seattle, WA, 98105

Experience the work of a visionary artist-activist Nobuko Miyamoto on Thursday, April 30 at the Kelly Ethnic Cultural Theater at the University of Washington. This event is free and in-person.

From Wing Luke Museum

Event details

item.title: FILM SCREENING - MAKING WAVES: THE RISE OF ASIAN AMERICA
item.description:
Sunday, May 3, 2026 at 11:30 AM

Location: Wing Luke Museum, 719 South King Street, Seattle, WA, 98104

Join community for a film screening of the documentary, Making Waves: The Rise of Asian America on Sunday, May 3. Filmmaker Jon Osaki will be present for a Q&A after the screening.

From Wing Luke Museum

Event details

item.title: NOBUKO MIYAMOTO: A SONG IN MOVEMENT FILM SCREENING
item.description:
Monday, May 4, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: North Creek Events Center, University of Washington, 18225 Campus Way Northeast, Bothell, WA, 98011

Join Anida Yoeu Ali and community for a film screening featuring the work of visionary artist-activist Nobuko Miyamoto on Monday, May 4 from 11AM-1PM at the University of Washington, Bothell Campus. This event is free and in-person.

From Wing Luke Museum

Event details

item.title: Chinatown/International District Art Walk
item.description:
Thursday, June 18, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Chinatown/International District, Seattle

Summer art walk in the Chinatown/International District

From Chinatown/International District Art Walk

Event details
